title: Procurement and legal approval waiting on vendor + legal review
summary: Drives a procurement request through intake, vendor outreach, a vendor-response wait state, legal review, and final approval. Demonstrates two cascading blocking obligations (vendor_response_pending then legal_review_pending) and a three-way SoD enforced by explicit `sod` requirements on `resume_legal_review` (legal_reviewer notSameAs [requester, procurement_lead]) and on `approve`/`reject` (procurement_lead notSameAs [requester, legal_reviewer]).

task.goal: Procure 50 seat licenses for VendorX analytics; needs legal sign-off on revised DPA.

steps.summary: Supervisor creates the workflow task pinned to procurement_legal_approval@1, binds requester / procurement_lead / legal_reviewer.

args.goal: Procure 50 seat licenses for VendorX analytics; needs legal sign-off on revised DPA.

steps.summary: Requester attaches the request packet (scope, vendor, DPA version, estimated spend).

evidence.summary: VendorX seat licenses x50, DPA v3, $84k/yr, 12mo term.

steps.summary: Procurement lead applies `wait_for_vendor`. Effects: blocking obligation vendor_response_pending + 5d timer.
Supervisor satisfies vendor_response_pending with a vendor_response evidence record.

evidence.summary: VendorX returned signed DPA v3 with redlines on §7.2; quote confirmed.

expectedStateAfter.note: obligation satisfied; status remains waiting until resume_legal_review.

steps.summary: Legal reviewer applies `resume_legal_review`. Requires obligation_satisfied + vendor_response evidence. Effect: open new blocking obligation legal_review_pending owned by legal_reviewer.
Legal reviewer attaches their legal_review record. Supervisor satisfies legal_review_pending obligation.

evidence.summary: DPA v3 redlines accepted; standard MSA clauses unchanged. Approve.
Approved: 50 seats VendorX analytics, $84k/yr, DPA v3.

steps.summary: Procurement lead applies `approve`. SoD ensures procurement_lead != requester.

alternateBranches.name: reject-instead-of-approve
alternateBranches.summary: From active/final_approval, procurement_lead may apply `reject` (supervisorBypass) -> closed/rejected with the same evidence + SoD requirements.

negativeChecks.name: approver-cannot-be-requester
negativeChecks.summary: Create a separate task binding requester AND procurement_lead to the same actor (e.g. both=alex). After legal review is satisfied, applying `complete_legal_review` rejects with `sod_violation` from the explicit procurement lead SoD requirement; the workflow prevents reaching `final_approval` with this conflicting binding.

negativeChecks.name: approver-cannot-be-legal-reviewer
negativeChecks.summary: Create a separate task binding procurement_lead AND legal_reviewer to the same actor. After the vendor obligation is satisfied, applying `resume_legal_review` rejects with `sod_violation` from the explicit `sod` requirement on `resume_legal_review`; the workflow prevents reaching `final_approval` with this conflicting binding.

negativeChecks.name: legal-reviewer-cannot-be-requester
negativeChecks.summary: Create a separate task binding requester AND legal_reviewer to the same actor (e.g. both=alex). After the vendor obligation is satisfied, apply `resume_legal_review`. Kernel rejects with `sod_violation` from the explicit `sod` requirement on `resume_legal_review` (`notSameAs: [requester, procurement_lead]`).

negativeChecks.name: legal-reviewer-cannot-be-procurement-lead
negativeChecks.summary: Create a separate task binding procurement_lead AND legal_reviewer to the same actor. After the vendor obligation is satisfied, apply `resume_legal_review`. Kernel rejects with `sod_violation`.

negativeChecks.name: requester-actor-cannot-act-as-procurement-lead
negativeChecks.summary: In the happy-path task, attempt `approve` with actor=alex claiming role=procurement_lead. Since alex is bound to requester (not procurement_lead), kernel rejects with `role_not_bound` (the binding check fires before the SoD check).

negativeChecks.name: resume-legal-review-without-vendor
negativeChecks.summary: Skip step 06: applying `resume_legal_review` rejects with `obligation_not_satisfied` (vendor_response_pending is still open and blocking).

negativeChecks.name: complete-legal-without-legal-review
negativeChecks.summary: Skip the legal_review evidence + obligation satisfaction in step 08: applying `complete_legal_review` rejects with `obligation_not_satisfied` (legal_review_pending is still open and blocking).
